signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Middle East escalation drives safe-haven demand — JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). USD/JPY at 159.44; 160.00 remains the key level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160. Risk-off flow historically unwinds JPY shorts — watch 157.00 as the first technical level on a sustained risk-off move.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD long positioning extreme — COT LF net long +41,675 (72% long). HV30 at 6.8%, ATM IV (FXE chain) at 8.2% — options pricing a 1.4 vol-pt premium over realized. AUD/USD at 0.7161; late-trend caution signal as price action stalls near recent highs. Watch for LF delta turning negative to invalidate.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Technical
signals.text: EUR/USD COT LF net short −72 (long%=50.0%). EUR/USD at 1.1715; testing the upper bound of recent range. 1.1748 is the next resistance on a continuation. Positioning stalling — watch for LF delta turning positive to shift the read.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP LF net long +28,426; AM constructive — positioning aligned with the carry read. GBP/USD at 1.3511 mid-range; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.

signals.title: AUD/JPY — Carry
signals.text: AUD/JPY carry advantage — RBA 4.10% vs BoJ 0.75% (+335bp). AUD/JPY at 114.16; carry-rich JPY crosses are vulnerable to risk-off unwinds. Watch for JPY safe-haven bid to intensify on a risk-off move.
